title: ‘It was a set-up, we were fooled’: the coalmine that ate an Indian village – podcast
author: Written by Ankur Paliwal and read by Raj Ghatak. Produced by Jessica Beck. The executive producer was Ellie Bury
standfirst: In a pristine forest in central India, the multibillion-dollar mining giant Adani has razed trees – and homes – to dig more coal. How does this kind of destruction get the go-ahead? By Ankur Paliwal
body_text: Archive: NDTV; Heritage Times Read text version here
